▪    LIS – Low Income Subsidy
▪    LEP – Late Enrollment Penalty
▪    FLG – Flag set in the system
▪    BRK – Broker
▪    PCP – Primary Care Physician
▪    GRP – Group/Subgroup information
▪    RDR – Rider
▪    COB – Coordination of Benefits
▪    MCD - Medicaid
▪    M3P-Medicare Prescription Payment Plan
